name: Collapsible Large Storage Bin - Brightroom™
description:
Organize any space in your home with this Collapsible Large Storage Bin from Brightroom™. Made of 100% recycled polyester, this large storage bin features a top zipper closure for easy accessibility, while the handles on the side offer hassle-free portability. This white storage box feature a mesh center for easy identification of contents and has a capacity of 6188 cubic inches to store an array of items. Best of all, it's collapsible for easy storage when not in use.

Brightroom™: See your space in a new light.
